mapper.select: SELECT JOB_CD , JOB_NM , JOB_DESC , JOB_CRON , MANUAL_EXEC_YN , USE_YN , DATE_FORMAT(LAST_EXEC_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS LAST_EXEC_DTM , LAST_EXEC_RSLT , DATE_FORMAT(CRE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS CRE_DTM FROM TB_BAT WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CRE_DTM

SELECT JOB_CD , JOB_NM , JOB_DESC , JOB_CRON , MANUAL_EXEC_YN , USE_YN , DATE_FORMAT(LAST_EXEC_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS LAST_EXEC_DTM , LAST_EXEC_RSLT , DATE_FORMAT(CRE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS CRE_DTM FROM TB_BAT WHERE JOB_CD = #{jobCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BAT ( JOB_CD, JOB_NM, JOB_DESC, JOB_CRON, MANUAL_EXEC_YN, USE_YN, DEL_YN, CRE_USR_CD, CRE_DTM ) VALUES ( #{jobCd}, #{jobNm}, #{jobDesc}, #{jobCron}, #{manualExecYn}, #{useYn}, 'N', #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT H.HIST_CD , H.JOB_CD , DATE_FORMAT(H.EXEC_START_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS EXEC_START_DTM , DATE_FORMAT(H.EXEC_END_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS EXEC_END_DTM , H.EXEC_RSLT , H.EXEC_TYPE , H.EXEC_USR_CD , H.TGT_CNT , H.PROC_CNT , H.ERR_MSG FROM TB_BAT_HIST H WHERE H.JOB_CD = #{jobCd} ORDER BY H.EXEC_START_DTM DESC LIMIT 50
